module.name: EndPoint Monitor
module.changelog: *1.1.1* Fixes stale endpoint alert backlog replay, requires selected endpoint alert candidates, aligns duplicate alert checks with alert type, and updates endpoint alert email wording. *1.1.0* Adds history pruning and single-row history deletion with page-load safety and CSRF hardening. *1.0.1* Fixes alert send reservation, duplicate Test Email binding risk, source labels, and release wording. *1.0.0* Adds reconciliation-driven email alert settings and per-recipient alert history using the FreePBX Job system. *0.2.2* Adds transition-based status history during reconciliation without alerting. *0.2.1* Adds FreePBX CSRF validation for AJAX actions, narrows discovery to PJSIP extension devices/users, maps NonQual to Registered (No Qualify), and documents CLI parsing technical debt. *0.2.0* Adds PJSIP endpoint discovery, per-endpoint monitoring toggles, persisted current status fields, and a manual read-only contact refresh. *0.1.0* Initial scaffold-only module shell. Adds FreePBX module identity, install/uninstall hooks, admin page, assets, and placeholder endpoint monitoring sections. No endpoint monitoring logic yet.
module.description: EndPoint Monitor provides PJSIP endpoint/contact status monitoring and alerting through FreePBX reconciliation jobs.
